changelog: Voice settings reorganized—clearer path, easier navigation. New system recording modes with descriptive labels. Auto-Select enabled by default—optimal path chosen automatically #64. Advanced microphone processing toggle—noise reduction, AGC, echo cancellation controls. Software mic gain added—boost input without changing system volume. Screen control entity display toggle—hide/show Screen On/Off and Lock Screen in HA, under Device Services. Recording source override fixed for specific devices—platform-specific branches preserved. Screensaver dark-based screen-off now uses independent lux monitoring. Delayed dark detection fixed for on-change sensors. Settings font sizes unified. Main settings layout fixed on large screens—independent scaling, dynamic magnification. Extension card layout fixed on small screens—bottom padding added.
